All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Card
Represents a playing card in the Cincuentazo game.
CardImageLoader
 
Deck
Manages the deck of cards, shuffling, drawing, and recycling.
GameController
Controller for the main game screen.
GameFlowManager
 
GameModel
Main model class for the Cincuentazo game.
GameOverController
 
HumanPlayer
Represents the human player in the game.
ICard
 
IDeck
 
InvalidMoveException
 
IPlayer
 
MachinePlayer
Represents a machine player with simple AI for card selection.
Main
 
MenuController
 
Player
Abstract class for all players (human and Machine).
